title: Hiro's First Day at Animal School
synopsis: Hiro goes to his first day at a special animal school where he meets friendly animal classmates and learns that school is a fun place to make new friends.

pages.text: Hiro walked into his new school. It was his very first day! He felt a little nervous but also excited. The classroom looked different from what he expected.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face standing at the entrance of a classroom filled with animal students drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with white and colored chalk, equations doodles on the walls, dusty texture, hand-drawn artistic warm feel
illustration.alt: Hiro entering a classroom full of animal students

pages.text: A friendly bunny hopped over to Hiro. 'Hi! I'm Bella Bunny. Want to sit next to me?' she asked with a warm smile. Hiro nodded and followed her to a small table.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face sitting next to a white bunny at a school table, drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with white and colored chalk, school supplies scattered around, dusty artistic texture
illustration.alt: Hiro sitting with Bella Bunny at a school table

pages.text: Soon, a gentle elephant named Eddie came over. 'Can I join you?' he asked politely. Then came Ollie Owl, who was very smart, and Penny Penguin, who loved to laugh.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face surrounded by animal friends including an elephant, owl, and penguin at school desks, drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with colored chalk, warm artistic feel with dusty texture
illustration.alt: Hiro with his new animal friends at school

pages.text: Their teacher, Mrs. Bear, was very kind. 'Today we'll learn about colors and numbers,' she said. Hiro raised his hand to share what he knew about the color blue.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face raising his hand in class with Mrs. Bear teacher and animal classmates, drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with white and colored chalk, equations and color drawings on board, dusty hand-drawn texture
illustration.alt: Hiro raising his hand in Mrs. Bear's classroom

pages.text: At snack time, all the animal friends shared their treats with Hiro. Eddie gave him peanuts, Bella shared carrots, and Ollie brought seeds. 'School is fun!' Hiro said happily.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face sharing snacks with animal friends around a lunch table, drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with colored chalk showing various snacks, warm artistic dusty texture
illustration.alt: Hiro sharing snacks with his animal friends

pages.text: When school ended, Hiro waved goodbye to his new friends. 'See you tomorrow!' he called out. He couldn't wait to come back and learn more with his animal friends.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face waving goodbye to his animal friends outside the school building, drawn in chalkboard style on dark green board with white and colored chalk, school building in background, warm dusty artistic texture
illustration.alt: Hiro waving goodbye to friends after his first day

metadata.illustrationStyle: chalkboard style, chalk drawings, dark green board, white and colored chalk, equations doodles, school themed, artistic warm, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board

questions.question: Who was the first animal friend to talk to Hiro?
questions.explanation: Bella Bunny was the first to hop over and invite Hiro to sit with her.

questions.question: What was their teacher's name?
questions.explanation: Their kind teacher was Mrs. Bear who taught them about colors and numbers.

questions.question: What did Eddie Elephant share at snack time?
questions.explanation: Eddie the elephant shared peanuts with Hiro during snack time.

questions.question: How did Hiro feel about school at the end?
questions.explanation: Hiro said 'School is fun!' and couldn't wait to come back the next day.
